// OPERATOR RULES: local MCP (stdio) = default lane, always on
remote MCP (Cloud Run) = disabled by default — one boolean flip to enable for a session
same tool names, same schemas, same command surface across both lanes

mcp.// LANE 1 — LOCAL (DEFAULT): stdio transport, always on, zero cold-start
mcp.// LANE 2 — REMOTE MIRROR (DISABLED BY D: HTTP transport, Cloud Run, operator-enabled per session

noizy-voice-bridge-remote.// ENABLE: Set enabled=true to activate the Cloud Run mirror for this session
noizy-voice-bridge-remote.// AUTH: Set NOIZY_BRIDGE_TOKEN in environment — same token as Cloud Run secret
noizy-voice-bridge-remote.// MIN_INSTANCES: Set min-instances=1 in service.yaml when you need warm cold-starts

// SESSION PROOF: Run after session: node packages/session-proof/cli.mjs export <SESSION_ID>
